title: boerhavia lantsangensis
intro: Boerhavia lantsangensis is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Nyctaginaceae family, commonly found in the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Boerhavia lantsangensis include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Boerhavia lantsangensis is traditionally prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
